title: Sponsorship
content:
# Sponsorship

From advertisements placed directly in the ice to naming rights and many things in between, we have a wide variety of cost-effective opportunities to advertise your business or group at our dedicated facility.

**Why should you advertise with us?** We offer a diverse, motivated, connected and growing audience to spread the word about your product or services.

The traffic through the facility includes local individuals participating in open houses and learn to curls, groups from corporate outings, and attendees at bonspiels from across the United States and Canada. 

**What kind of advertising?** We have a variety of options, including in-ice advertising spots, wall banners and event sponsorship. 

[Download our Sponsorship Opportunities](https://links.tccnc.club/sponsorshipopportunities) for more information on advertising opportunities or email us at [](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#4f3c3f20213c203d3c27263f0f3b3d262e2128232a2c3a3d23262128612c2022)[**sponsorship@trianglecurling.com** ](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#86f5f6e9e8f5e9f4f5eeeff6c6f2f4efe7e8e1eae3e5f3f4eaefe8e1a8e5e9eb)

---
